title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 13 - 2017: Boulderome Kingdom & Republic in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a low-productivity day in Boulder on February 13, 2017, describing getting up late after getting high, doing light organizing around the house, and driving to his mom's to shampoo his car but forgetting his MP3 player. He spends most of the video explaining a video game or simulation project he calls 'Boulderome' — a recreation of ancient Rome mapped onto Boulder, Colorado, with sister-city mining towns, Roman aqueducts, and historically proportioned tribes based on local geography.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Frustrated with himself for wasting the day but optimistic about tomorrow's tasks
Excited and proud of the historical accuracy of his Boulder-Rome mapping simulation
